comparison_surface_note: Compares official Play clientbound game_event framed packet id and Type/float body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

official_source.function_or_member: ClientboundGameEventPacket(Type, float), ClientboundGameEventPacket.STREAM_CODEC, private ClientboundGameEventPacket(FriendlyByteBuf), private write(FriendlyByteBuf), FriendlyByteBuf.readUnsignedByte/writeByte, FriendlyByteBuf.readFloat/writeFloat, ClientboundGameEventPacket.Type id table, GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), GameProtocols.CLIENTBOUND_TEMPLATE.bind(RegistryFriendlyByteBuf.decorator(RegistryAccess.EMPTY)).codec().encode/decode(ClientboundGameEventPacket), ClientboundGameEventPacket.getEvent(), getParam()

internal_owner.symbol_or_test_surface: packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Play, Direction::Clientbound, official packet id, official body)
internal_owner.scope_note: Current implementation witness for Play clientbound game_event framed dispatch/decode; not game event semantics, initialized Level/player/weather state, render readiness, or client-load completion.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Play clientbound game_event packet framing and dispatch/decode for one Type/float fixture only; it does not prove game event semantics, initialized Level/player/weather state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
